metadata.description: CyberOS plugin marketplace - author, audit, and ship feature requests under a governed workflow, in any repo.

plugins.name: cyberos
plugins.description: Turn an idea, PRD, or spec into audited feature requests (/new-fr), then ship them (/ship-feature-requests) through implement -> review -> test -> done. /init installs the machine into any repo. HITL required at the two human-acceptance gates; agents never push, merge, deploy, or self-accept.
